heading: Distribution of assets on dissolution
label: 80106 Distribution of assets on dissolution
text: On dissolution of the corporation, the board of directors shall liquidate and distribute its assets to organizations qualified as exempt organizations under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 () with purposes similar to those of the corporation.26 U.S.C. 501(c)(3)
